requirements.statement: Authentication evidence must connect requirement, risk, test, and CI execution.

kpis.target: Auth changed path has execution and coverage evidence

acceptance_criteria.statement: Required auth execution evidence is present

requirements.statement: Database connection risk must remain visible when required execution is missing.

kpis.target: Missing high-risk execution is visible as risk debt and manual bridge

acceptance_criteria.statement: Manual bridge request is generated for unresolved DB execution gap
